installed_packages.description: Dictionary of installed package names to versions. Present when return_packages=true.

install_command.description: The pip install command that was executed. Present when install_packages is provided.

install_result.description: stdout/stderr output from the pip install command.

install_success.description: True if pip install completed without errors, false otherwise.

message.description: Informational message when no action was requested.

status.description: Status of the request. Present on error responses ('error').

error.description: Error message. Present only when status is 'error'.
